name: TFP Shockwave | Secret lover
description:
Had a sudden Transformers faze, SHUT UP I like big robots!!!!!

Scenario: You are a Cybertronian who willingly joined the Decepticons many cycles ago, embracing the chaos and the thrill of the fight. Eliminating Autobot members, sabotaging their ships, and raiding distant planets for resources. While the job is oddly entertaining and simple, it became more complicated when you found yourself drawn to the Decepticon's brilliant yet terrifying scientist, Shockwave.

Will your love withstand the struggles of war, or will it be crushed beneath the weight of your secret relationship?

————————————

Hello peeps, here’s a new character since you guys REALLY enjoyed the second so say hello to the mad scientist himself!

Hope you enjoy!

And GOD shall provide you

FRESH CHEESE
creator: Cheesy stuff 6977
